title: Gujarat Technological University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Gujarat Technological University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Gujarat Technological University Result 2026 out for MAM Sem 1 Regular, MPH Sem 1 Remedial and BPH Sem 3 Regular/Remedial Dec 2025 exams on the official website - gtu.ac.in on 30 Mar 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the GTU result.

content.text: Gujarat Technological University has declared the GTU Result 2026 for several Winter 2025 pharmacy and management examinations, including MAM Semester 1 Regular, MPH Semester 1 Remedial and BPH Semester 3 Regular and Remedial (Re-check/Re-assess). GTU Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - gtu.ac.in - through the central result portal, where students can log in with their enrollment details and view updated marks.

Students can check their GTU Winter 2025 marksheets by opening the course wise result links, entering their enrolment number/seat number and submitting the form to see subject wise scores, SPI/CPI and result status. After downloading the online result, they should verify their personal details, course, semester, exam session and re-check/re-assess status and contact the university or their institute if any discrepancy is noticed.

sections.heading: Gujarat Technological University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: GTU has published fresh results and re-check/re-assess outcomes for integrated management (MAM), postgraduate public health (MPH) and bachelor of pharmacy (BPH) programmes for the December 2025 (Winter 2025) exam session. These updates include both main results and post-reassessment results, along with a specific last date for online re-check/re-assess applications for some courses.

GTU hosts individual exam results on its dedicated result domain, which can be accessed from the main result page. The following links are used for the Dec 2025 MAM, MPH and BPH Sem 3 results and re-check/re-assess outcomes.

links.label: Result of MAM Sem 1 – Regular (Dec 2025) Exam
Result of MPH Sem 1 – Remedial (Dec 2025) Exam
Result of BPH Sem 3 – Regular (Dec 2025) Re-check/Re-Assess
Result of BPH Sem 3 – Remedial (Dec 2025) Re-check/Re-Assess
GTU Main Result Page – All Courses

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your GTU MAM, MPH or BPH Sem 3 Result 2026 (Winter 2025):

items: Visit the GTU result page: https://www.gtu.ac.in/result.aspx.

Click on the relevant result link for your course and exam session, or open the direct URLs given above for: MAM Sem 1 – Regular (Dec 2025) MPH Sem 1 – Remedial (Dec 2025) BPH Sem 3 – Regular (Dec 2025) Re-check/Re-Assess BPH Sem 3 – Remedial (Dec 2025) Re-check/Re-Assess.
MAM Sem 1 – Regular (Dec 2025)
MPH Sem 1 – Remedial (Dec 2025)
BPH Sem 3 – Regular (Dec 2025) Re-check/Re-Assess
BPH Sem 3 – Remedial (Dec 2025) Re-check/Re-Assess.
On the result page, enter your Enrolment Number (and seat number or captcha if asked).
Click on Search / Get Result / Submit to display your result.
Check your personal details, course name, semester, exam session (Dec 2025), subject wise grades and SPI/CPI or total marks.
Download or print your result for academic records, re-check/re-assess applications and future reference.

Result of MPH Sem 1 – Remedial (Dec 2025) Exam
Result of BPH Sem 3 – Regular (Dec 2025) Re-check/Re-Assess
Result of BPH Sem 3 – Remedial (Dec 2025) Re-check/Re-Assess
GTU Main Result Page – All Courses
